use_cases: Simple counter for incrementing and decrementing numeric values
Quantity selector for product pages or cart interfaces
Basic interactive demo component for learning React state
ai_summary: A minimalist React counter component featuring increment and decrement buttons with useState management. Displays a numeric value that users can adjust through simple click interactions. Uses basic Tailwind styling with centered layout and rounded corners, suitable as a foundational building block for quantity selectors or stepper inputs in various UI contexts.
